fields.about_me: Im just a chill guy, GOAT of MMA!

fields.title: Airsoft
fields.description: I'll teach you tactics, gun handling & safety, and organize games/scenarios. In exchange, I'm looking for skills in photography, videography, or outdoor gear repair. Let's exchange skills and level up together!

fields.title: Amateur geology
fields.description: Geology enthusiast! I'll share knowledge on rock identification, geological mapping, and mineral exploration. Open to any skill exchange.

fields.title: BMX
fields.description: Been in the BMX game for around 5 years. I am looking for some graphic design exchange skills.

fields.title: Camping
fields.description: Been on the camping game for quite a while, and I'm happy to share my knowledge on setting up campfires, a tent, and hunting.

fields.title: Boxing
fields.description:
Boxing Lessons
Certified instructor offering private & group classes. Improve technique, fitness & confidence. Trade your skills for mine on this platform.

fields.title: Chess
fields.description: Enjoy the strategic art of chess with personalized lessons tailored to your skill level! Whether you're a beginner learning the basics or an intermediate player aiming to sharpen your tactics, I've been playing chess for +10 years.

fields.title: Meditation
fields.description: Discover the power of mindfulness and inner peace with an exchange meditation guidance!

fields.title: Paracaidismo
fields.description: Soar high and free! I offer a personalized exchange of my paraglading skill. Learn to master the art of paragliding and push your limits in a safe  environment.

fields.title: Calisthenics
fields.description: Unlock your body’s full potential with personalized calisthenics training! This skill exchange offers guidance on mastering bodyweight exercises that improve strength, flexibility, and endurance for all levels!
